name: Status Brew
highlight_text: StatusBrew is best for integrating with best-in-class tools from the digital industry
description:
Let StatusBrew Work for You. 

StatusBrew has a complete suite of social media management tools for managing profiles on Facebook and other social media platforms. The content publisher enables  prompt creation, planning, and scheduling posts on Facebook and other social platforms. StatusBrew also boasts integrations with over fifteen best-in-class marketing tools to enhance your productivity and build an active community of followers.
‍

Source: StatusBrew

Key Features from StatusBrew.           

  • Social management: Status Brew’s comprehensive suite of social media management tools equips you with all you need to manage your profiles on Facebook and other platforms.
  • Social analytics, reports, and dashboards: Get access to analytics tools and reports (including exportable reports), and track trends find the best-performing ideas. Manage your account and track your audience engagement from the same dashboard. 
  • Integrated solutions: StatusBrew integrates with fifteen top-rated digital marketing tools, including Slack, Shopify, Hubspot, Salseforce, and Google Drive.
  • White labeled reports provide insights to help you get the best ROI from your marketing efforts. The insights are available in easily-to-share formats.   

 Unique Benefits of Using StatusBrew. 

The key benefits of using StatusBrew includes:

  1. StatusBrew offers a comprehensive range of features. These features provide insights to help bridge the gap between businesses and customers, among other things.  
  2. The one-stop dashboard also hosts top-rated digital marketing tools like Slack, Shopify, Hubspot, Salesforce, Google Drive, and others. 
  3. Workflows enable internal and external team interaction and client collaboration. Users can assign access rights to files and streamline approval processes.
  4. The customizable white-labeled report eliminates social noise and encourages you to understand your customers' online behavior. 

Choose the Best Pricing Option for Your Business. 

Four plans are available for StatusBrew users, starting at USD 69 / month.

Consider the Following Pros of StatusBrew. 

  • Trusted Platform with millions of users worldwide 
  • Tons of features for social media management.  
  • Great customer support.  
  • White-labeled reports for monitoring multiple accounts.
  • Social media management integrations, incuding top-rated tools for digital marketing  

Beware of the Following Cons of StatusBrew. 

  • Recent upgrades have made the app less user friendly.   
  • It doesn’t support many important social media platforms.

‍
